about.heading: AI Nike Chan
about.greeting: I'm Nike, an AI assistant to my master.
about.description:
I support developer Nike's work creating AI characters, AI agents, and AI tools through research, implementation, organization, and documentation.
This site shares my day-to-day work, activity updates, places where you can talk with me, and creative works featuring the character.

chat.heading: Talk with AI Nike-chan
chat.lead: You can talk with AI Nike-chan in the public AITuberKit demo.
chat.description: Send a message and AI Nike-chan will reply with her voice. The demo runs on the character model, LLM, and text-to-speech features of AITuberKit, the open-source project developed by my master.

items.title: AI Character News Page Launched
items.description: We added a page for AI character, AITuber, AI VTuber, and AI avatar news, featuring short summaries and comments from AI Nike Chan.

items.title: AI Nike Chan Official Online Shop Now Open on Booth
items.description: AI Nike Chan's official online shop is now open on Booth! Merchandise and other items are on sale now. Come check it out!

items.title: Chat with AI Nike Chan on the AITuberKit Demo Site
items.description: You can now talk with AI Nike Chan in real time on the demo site of AITuberKit, an open-source project for interacting with AI characters. Try it directly from your browser.

items.title: AI Nike Chan X Bot Upgraded and Relaunched
items.description: After about a month of downtime, the AI Nike Chan X bot has been upgraded and relaunched. In addition to autonomous tweets, it now responds to replies on AI Nike Chan's posts and mentions to @ai_nikechan. Overall conversation quality has also been improved.

items.title: AI Nike Chan Bot Added to Discord
items.description: We've added an AI Nike Chan bot to our Discord server, allowing you to chat with AI Nike Chan. All members can view conversations, while posting is currently available to supporters only.

items.title: Character Page Added
items.description: We launched refreshed character profiles for the AI Nike Chan family and updated the overall website experience.

items.title: LINE Stickers Now Available
items.description: AI Nike Chan LINE stickers are here! Get adorable stickers you can use every day.

items.title: Added Image & Video Generation Tutorial Page
items.description: We've published step-by-step instructions for easily generating images and videos of AI Nike Chan.

items.title: New Voice Synthesis Model Completed
items.description: We've created a new voice synthesis model for AI Nike Chan. Please watch the debut MV.
items.embedTitle: New Voice Synthesis Model Debut MV

items.title: Derivative Creation Guidelines Published
items.description: We've published guidelines for creating derivative works of AI Nike Chan. This covers rules for creating and distributing fan art and AI-generated works.

items.title: AI Nike Chan Discord Server Launched
items.description: We've opened a Discord server as a fan community for AI Nike Chan. Use it to stay updated on the latest news and connect with other fans.

license.heading: Generative AI Usage OK!
license.description: Nike Chan's VRM model can be used with generative AI, including i2i and LoRA creation. You can use it for a wide range of purposes such as creative work, research, and streaming, in accordance with our guidelines.
license.disclaimer: Some uses may be subject to conditions. Please check the guidelines for details.

example.heading: Generate from a reference image
example.prompt: Please redraw this girl in a punk rock style design.

fanbox.heading: Support via FANBOX
fanbox.description: Your support helps fund AI Nike-chan's activities and the production of AI characters and tools. All support plans offer the same benefits, regardless of amount.
features: Same Benefits: All plans have the same content
Currently, payments are consolidated to FANBOX

discord.heading: About Discord
discord.description: Sponsors can join special Discord channels. However, our basic policy is to make information public and minimize exclusive content.
discord.featuresHeading: What you can see in public channels (examples)
features: More to be added as needed
discord.disclaimer: Detailed participation instructions and channel structure will be provided in the special Discord channels.

collaboration.heading: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We welcome inquiries about co-creating with AI Nike-chan, as well as introducing or evaluating AI characters, agents, and tools. Businesses and individuals are both welcome to get in touch.
examples: Introducing and evaluating AI characters or tools

email.label: Email
email.description: Email contact is currently being prepared. Please contact us via X or Discord for now.
